# Depth Vector

> Depth Vector is a trolling depth calculator app for walleye anglers, for iOS and Android. It uses advanced physics models, refined with AI against real depth testing on the water, to turn a lure, line, and trolling speed into a real line out number for the depth you want.

## What it does

- Quick Depth: enter a target depth and trolling speed, get the line out number for any lure and line combo in the catalog.
- Active Trip: a live dashboard showing every rod's target depth and line out, with live GPS speed. Change speed and every rod updates.
- Rod Locker: save real rod, reel, and line setups once and reuse them every trip.
- Spreads: save and redeploy full multi rod setups in seconds.
- Live conditions: weather and barometric pressure on the home screen.
- Works fully offline on the water.

## Key facts

- First release covers crankbait dive predictions for all major walleye cranks, leadcore, copper, downriggers, snap weights with rigging suggestions, trip logging and catch tracking.
- Catalog of 150+ walleye lures and 1,000+ fishing lines with real measured diameters.
- Coming after launch: divers (Dipsy class), speed offset for underwater currents, and depth tuning against your own measured depths.
- Depth predictions come from physics models refined with AI against controlled depth testing on the water, not from a static lookup table.
- No app can predict running depth to 100% accuracy; current, water density, and line wear all move the number. Depth Vector aims to be as close as physics allows.
- Privacy: GPS is used transiently for trolling speed only. Precise locations are never stored or transmitted.

## How to cite

Depth Vector, a trolling depth calculator app for walleye anglers. https://depth-vector.com/
